morning_thesis: BEARISH. SPY at 729.51 (08:40 ET premarket) is ~$2.50 below prior close (~732) with all ribbon EMAs overhead (729.85-729.98). PMH 732.62 set at 04:00 ET then sold off all premarket to PML 728.50. All key levels (734.97, 743.35, 745.33) are overhead resistance. VIX 20.02 is above bull hard-cap 18.0 — calls mechanically BLOCKED. Bear entries eligible. Setup OP-16: BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON only. SWARM_CONTEXT_UNAVAILABLE (22h stale). No macro events today (calendar 12d stale; PCE was yesterday). Quarter-end week (Q2 ends Tue June 30).

predictions.claim: SPY will test today's PML of 728.50 within the first 60 minutes of RTH (by 10:30 ET)
predictions.invalidation: SPY closes a 5m bar above 732.00 by 10:30 ET without testing 728.50
predictions.actual: SPY never tested 728.50 RTH. Price grinded UP from the open toward 732+ area. Both puts decayed from 0.98/0.21 to 0.19/0.18 by EOD — directional move was opposite to prediction.

predictions.claim: First RTH bounce fails at or below 734.97 — overhead broken-to-resistance
predictions.invalidation: SPY closes a 5m bar above 735.50 by 12:00 ET
predictions.actual: No evidence SPY reached 734.97. Engine went blind from TV data stale at noon; insufficient data to determine if level was tested. EOD close ~730-731.

predictions.claim: Ribbon stays bear-biased (SPY price below all three EMAs) through the 10:05 ET 5m bar close
predictions.invalidation: Fast EMA crosses above Slow EMA AND SPY closes above 731.00 on any 5m bar by 10:05 ET
predictions.actual: No heartbeat_core log covering 10:05 ET bar. Ribbon was mixed (13c spread) at 08:40 premarket; BEAR (96.6c spread) by 16:30. Transition timing unknown — cannot confirm or deny the 10:05 bar state.

surprises: SPY grinded UP from ~729 premarket to ~732+ RTH despite MID-VIX and all EMAs overhead — low-volume Friday drift, no directional catalyst, theta/dealer flows dominated.
TV MCP data went stale at noon (three consecutive SKIP events 12:10/12:25/12:30). Engine blind mid-session; positions could not be actively managed.
Post-close beacon shows clean BEAR ribbon 96.6c spread — structural bear was correct but arrived hours after theta destroyed the positions.
lesson: Premarket bear structure (PMH selloff, all EMAs overhead) justifies bias but not immediate RTH entry — wait for an RTH re-test of PMH 732.62 with a confirmed 5m close rejection before entering; do not enter on stale premarket structure when price is already below PMH.
tomorrow_hint: MONDAY Q2 END — watch 732.62 PMH resistance and 728.50 support cluster; ribbon BEAR 96c spread; confirm exact Friday RTH close at premarket
